title: 6Pcs Plastic Scraper, Flexible Paint Scraper, Putty Knife Tool Set for Spackling, Patching, Decals, Wallpaper, Remover Sticker, Car Painting Scrapers
features: 6 Pcs Includes: This Putty Knife Set of 6 with variety of size from 1.5" 2" 3" 4" 6" 8"inches，The putty knife is made of high-quality plastic raw materials, with uniform color and long-lasting use

Tamale Spreader Tool: These putty knives can also be used to make Tamales, ordered them to put the dough on the leaves for corn hushes for homemade tamales and it is so much easier.Theses are perfect for homemade tamales
Plastic Scraper Tool: Highly utilized by carpenters, construction workers and handymen, the plastic putty knife set is ideal for sheetrock and tile work

Painting Art: Artists love this assorted knife set for prepping and painting large canvases or for simple arts and crafts. These lightweight tools are perfect for working with cheaper mediums, such as glue, gloss, gesso and other sealers
Main purpose: Ideal for puttying windows, removing loose putty, scraping paint, removing loose paint, removing vinyl or paper wall covering and patching dents cracks holes in plaster
